title: Coding with ADK to beat a text adventure game
summary: A Google Cloud Tech livestream featuring Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar demonstrating the Agent Development Kit by using it to solve a text adventure game through coding and agentic AI techniques.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech livestream features Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar building with the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to solve a text adventure game. The game serves as a concrete target for demonstrating how to code agents and apply agentic AI techniques. Viewers see ADK used in practice rather than described in the abstract, with the puzzle structure of a text adventure providing the test case for agentic workflows.
